title: Mom / Dad — Dec 2021 Christmas gift ideas + Sebastian
html:
TL;DR

  • 18yo Yahir, home from his first OSU term, drafts a parent-gift list mid-December: mom = "live near sun" (aspirational not literal), massage, work with 3-5 year olds (illusion); dad = something for Corvette, "environment of learning and activity"
  • "Basketball hoop for little witty Sebastian" — first appearance of Sebastian in the corpus (younger relative, not yet stubbed elsewhere)
  • The aspiration-as-gift framing — "environment of learning and activity" — is closer to a wish for his parents' lives than a purchasable item; Yahir at 18 is already conflating "what I want for them" with "what I can buy them"
  • "Massage for Christmas" is a rare practical line in the note; the rest is wish-state
  • Mom's "(illusion)" parenthetical next to "work with 3-5 year olds" reads as Yahir flagging that the desire is unrealistic — early instance of his name the illusion habit (feeding illusion or ending it)

Notes

The interest of the note is what Yahir thinks his parents want. Mom: warmth (live near sun), bodywork (massage), purpose (work with toddlers — even if "illusion"). Dad: a Corvette-related thing and an "environment of learning and activity." The dad list is striking — Yahir is picking up the dad's frustration with stagnation and wishing him an environment for growth. Neither is a thing you wrap.

The "(illusion)" aside — Yahir at 18 is already deploying the verb illusion in his self-talk, the same word that anchors the much-later concept page feeding illusion or ending it. This is one of the earliest verifiable uses of that vocabulary in his Apple Notes — pre-dates the explicit 2019 essay reference if held against 2019 09 25 feeding illusion or ending it.

Sebastian introduced as "little witty Sebastian" — the diminutive + character-tag pattern Yahir uses for kids he's affectionate with (compare the "Yermy" / "Yermers" naming for Emilio). Likely a cousin or family-friend's child given the basketball-hoop / Christmas-gift framing.

The note as a whole is a window into Yahir's first Christmas back from college — he's home, he's noticing his parents differently, and he's trying to compose love into a list.

Connections

yahir family · iracema vargas · sebastian · corvette · feeding illusion or ending it · dad wisdom · debt of gratitude · 2019 09 25 feeding illusion or ending it · osu

related.label: 'Feeding illusion or ending it' — Sep 2019 family-conflict decision note
